summary.domain: Multi-tenant supplement e-commerce SaaS (MYR, amounts in integer sen). Many stores on one codebase, isolated by store_id + RLS, resolved by Host/subdomain.
summary.stage: feature-complete + runtime-validated against live staging; sole open production gate is Stripe config (not code)

nodes.role: Request entry: per-IP rate limiting then session refresh + /account & /admin guards
GOD NODE (in-deg 26) — Zod-validated env, client/server split, fail-fast
GOD NODE (in-deg 23) — central business rules (currency, shipping, bundles, loyalty, subscriptions, roles)
GOD NODE (in-deg 23) — money math in integer sen
cn() Tailwind class-merge helper
Cookieless anon client — SSG/ISR catalog reads (no headers/cookies)
Browser anon client (RLS)
GOD NODE (in-deg 17) — cookie-bound server client (RLS as user)
Session refresh + route protection; resolves tenant
GOD NODE (in-deg 18) — service-role client, BYPASSES RLS; app-layer perms are the boundary
Host/subdomain -> store slug resolution
GOD NODE (in-deg 12) — resolves active store for a request
7-role permission matrix — single source of truth; resolveRoleKey() w/ isDefaultStore-gated legacy fallback
GOD NODE (in-deg 10) — getCurrentActor(): identity + store role + permissions
In-memory per-IP fixed-window limiter
AUTH 15/min, API 60/min wiring
Stripe client + Connect destination-charge helpers

Products/categories/PDP/SEO; store-scoped catalog reads via supabase/public
Cart + AOV (bundles, cross-sell, coupons)
Stripe checkout (one-time + subscription), idempotent webhook, refunds
Orders, subscriptions, addresses, profile, rewards, referrals, stores, invitations self-service

Invitations + membership status + audit; sole-owner protection (policy.ts)
Self-serve store provisioning; slug policy (policy.ts)
Per-store loyalty points
Referral rewards

Conversion-rate-optimization components (exit-intent, etc.)
PostHog/GA4/Meta + compliance
Auth form + Google OAuth + password flows
Resend email templates/senders
0001-0010 single-store; 0011-0014 multi-tenant (stores/scoping/rbac/membership); 0015 idempotency; 0016 signup search_path fix
Offline preflight gate (8 gates): typecheck/lint/test/build + schema/config/RBAC/tenant/payment/E2E-presence/security
Runtime gate (10 gates): connectivity/migrations/structure/RLS/isolation/RBAC/Stripe/config; --strict --payments --target=
Playwright: smoke, access-control, purchase-path, rbac, store-isolation, invite-flow, tenant-routing, account-and-admin

architectureNotes: Tenant isolation is two-layered: query-layer .eq('store_id', …) for storefront (RLS can't see Host) + RLS security boundary (public-read-active / owner / store-member).
Service-role writes mean app-layer RBAC checks ARE the boundary; legacy global-admin fallback gated on isDefaultStore (regression-tested).
Public catalog reads must use supabase/public.ts (cookieless) to preserve SSG/ISR.
handle_new_user keeps search_path = public, extensions (pgcrypto in extensions) — migration 0016.
Money always integer sen; pricing recomputed server-side.

issues.detail: Placeholder Stripe key — the sole open production gate; charge/refund/webhook idempotency unvalidated until a real key is set (config, not code).
Hand-reconstructed after a failed db:types emptied it; regenerate against the live schema.
graph.md/json are produced by direct file analysis per workspace policy; rerun after large structural changes.
